scope_lock.source: First implementation tranche from the Core Business Catalog audit: establish the five stable business groups and expose product kind and validated attributes through the existing product flow.
in_scope: BusinessGroup enum and five Phase 1 groups
ProductKind additions for SEED and SEEDLING while preserving legacy CROP_SEED
Tenant-enabled business groups with mixed and specialist store profiles
Product create/update/list/detail DTO, validation, persistence, and response fields
Product attribute validation for the first five groups
out_of_scope: Batch FEFO allocation and purchase receiving
Sales, returns, stock adjustments, and Handbook runtime
Regulatory registry integrations and AI diagnosis

tasks/task-R0-01-business-taxonomy.md.title: Persist the five business groups and tenant profile

tasks/task-R0-02-product-contract.md.title: Validate and expose category-specific product contracts

tasks/task-R1-01-product-api-tests.md.title: Prove product taxonomy API behavior and tenant isolation

design_context.discovery_reason: The audit identified a concrete missing taxonomy and product contract in existing Prisma/Nest product code.
